# NiceSalt

NiceSalt helps lean teams move quickly online without leaving a fragile mess behind: websites, product prototypes, content workflows, and practical AI-assisted features.

## Services

- Modern websites
- Product prototypes
- Content workflows
- Practical AI features inside products and operations

## Selected work

- RobinBerzinMD.com: health media site with articles, newsletters, courses, book pages, and clearer engagement paths.
- ExplorerHealth.co: harm-reduction product prototype with assessment, evidence content, privacy-minded positioning, and AI-assisted guidance concepts.

## Contact

Project inquiries: hello@nicesalt.com
